name: phoenix
trigger: eval-metric degradation over the lookback window: rising hallucination/fabrication flags (the voice-agent containment watchdog), latency p95 breach (PHOENIX_P95_MS, default 5000), or token-spend spike (PHOENIX_TOKENS_MAX, off by default) -- thresholds in extract.py
env_doc: PHOENIX_API_KEY carries auth (NAME only here; value env-only, never written to any file). The query path also reads PHOENIX_HOST and PHOENIX_PROJECT.
